title: Just sharing. This ai-trading platform is new. Has anyone else tried it?
author: Cute-Opposite4751
selftext:
Read some articles about UpsideOnly and I’m curious what people here think...

From what I understand, it’s not a normal broker or prop firm. Users paper trade, the platform analyzes aggregated trading signals/patterns, and if the company decides to act on those signals, it uses its own capital for the real trade.

Don't know much more about them... seems to be an interesting model, but obviously worth testing.

Thoughts???

comments.author: tinfoil_powers
comments.body: Train someone else's AI to be a better trader and get paid mere pennies? I'd rather build my own
